display.purpose: Landing hero headlines. Cormorant Garamond 600 only.

body.purpose: Marketing paragraphs and long-form copy. Lora 400, max 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Forms, tables, nav, buttons, status. system-ui via font-ui.

code.purpose: Ingest URLs, HTTP methods, JSON. font-ui 0.8125rem, tabular-nums where needed.

shadows.name: ingest-reveal
shadows.purpose: Single marketing card after inbox creation on landing.

shadows.name: demo-glow-rest
shadows.purpose: Live webhook demo panel ambient lift at rest.

shadows.name: demo-glow-peak
shadows.purpose: Animated peak state on demo panel only.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Landing orb drift, count-up, replay pulse. Default marketing easing.

motion.name: ease-product
motion.purpose: Product UI transitions 150–250ms. State feedback only.

motion.name: ticker-linear
motion.purpose: Provider logo marquee. Pauses on track hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default forward action: open inbox, sign in, new inbox, replay.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; height: 2rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.42 0.075 46); color: oklch(0.97 0.01 78); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.075 46 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.06 48); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary actions: copy URL, retry, cancel.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.02 75); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: oklch(0.96 0.018 78); color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 76); color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.06 48); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary nav actions: sign out, low-emphasis links in chrome.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 1.75rem; padding: 0.375rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.02 76); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Auth and settings fields. 32px height, transparent fill.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 2rem; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.02 75); border-radius: 0.625rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.52 0.03 52); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.06 48); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.48 0.12 28); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.48 0.12 28 / 0.2); }

components.name: Dashboard Nav Link
components.html: Inboxes
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.03 52); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); } .ds-nav-link--active { background: oklch(0.94 0.025 74); color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); }

components.name: Inbox List Row
components.description: Border-separated dashboard row. No card wrapper.
components.html:
Stripe Integration/xK9m2pQ7nR4a
12 events
components.css: .ds-inbox-row { display: grid; gap: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.02 75); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; align-items: center; } .ds-inbox-row__name a { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); text-decoration: none; } .ds-inbox-row__name a:hover { color: oklch(0.42 0.075 46); } .ds-inbox-row__id { display: block; margin-top: 0.125rem; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.03 52); } .ds-inbox-row__meta { font-size: 0.875rem; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(0.36 0.045 48); }

components.name: Landing CTA Pill
components.description: Hero call-to-action on marketing pages. Taller, fully rounded.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.42 0.075 46); color: oklch(0.97 0.01 78); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: oklch(0.42 0.075 46 / 0.85); } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.06 48 / 0.5); }

components.name: Signal Badge
components.description: Live webhook / success indicator in demo and inbox.
components.css: .ds-badge-signal { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(0.94 0.04 145); color: oklch(0.42 0.11 145); font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-badge-signal__dot { width: 0.5rem; height: 0.5rem; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.55 0.12 145); }

narrative.overview: Hookscope looks like a well-lit developer bench: warm cream surfaces, terracotta accents used sparingly, and typography that shifts from editorial serif on the landing to system UI in the debugger. Density is controlled. Lists and borders carry structure; cards appear only when grouping related actions. Depth comes from tonal layering more than heavy shadows.
keyCharacteristics: OKLCH terracotta/crème palette with tinted neutrals
Dual typography: serif editorial landing, font-ui product surfaces
Restrained terracotta accent ≤10% on product screens
Signal green for live webhook states only

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta primary occupies ≤10% of any product screen. Signal green is even rarer: live state only.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds, borders, and text neutrals carry a warm hue. Never use untinted #000 or #fff.

rules.name: The Two Registers Rule
rules.body: Landing uses Cormorant + Lora. Dashboard, inbox, auth use font-ui for headings, labels, tables, and code.

rules.name: The Flat Product Rule
rules.body: Dashboard and inbox UI do not use drop shadows on list rows. Separation is by border-border only.

rules.name: The Motion-Only Lift Rule
rules.body: On landing, elevation may animate. In product UI, hover changes tone or border, not shadow stacks.

dos: Do use OKLCH tokens from packages/ui/src/styles/globals.css
Do use font-ui for dashboard, inbox, auth, tables, and code
Do use Cormorant + Lora on landing only
Do separate lists with border-b border-border
Do use signal green for live/success webhook semantics
Do provide focus-visible rings on interactive controls
donts: Don't default to observability dark-blue dashboards (Datadog / Grafana aesthetic)
Don't build bloated webhook admin UIs (Hookdeck / RequestBin clutter)
Don't use email marketing product chrome (Resend / SendGrid vibes)
Don't use generic SaaS purple Inter templates, hero metrics, or identical icon-card grids
Don't use crypto neon, glassmorphism-as-decoration, gradient text, or side-stripe accent borders
Don't put serif display fonts on data tables or replay panels
Don't animate layout properties on hover
Don't open modals when inline expansion suffices
